name: Ireland
intro: Ireland hosts the European headquarters of much of the global technology and pharmaceutical industry, and those employers bring their certification culture with them. Dublin's tech multinationals, the pharma plants of Cork and the midlands, and a financial-services sector swollen by post-Brexit relocations all hire delivery professionals against international benchmarks — PMP and Scrum credentials travel across all of them. Irish employers fund training generously through well-established learning budgets. Our live online weekend batch runs on the IST schedule, converting to early-morning to mid-afternoon Irish time, leaving your weekend evenings intact. The cohort is international, matching Ireland's own workforce. After the workshop you get exam application guidance, realistic mock exams, and open trainer access for doubts until the certificate is yours.

faq.q: How much does certification training cost in Ireland?
faq.a: The course fee is US$1,295 for PMP and US$695 for CSM, covering the full live online weekend workshop, study materials, mock exams and exam application support. PMI's PMP exam fee (US$425 member / US$675 non-member) is paid separately to PMI; the CSM exam is included in the course fee.

faq.q: Are the classes live or recorded?
faq.a: Every batch is taught live by an instructor over two weekend days — not pre-recorded videos. You can ask questions in real time, work through exercises with the cohort, and reach the trainer afterwards for doubts.

faq.q: Is the certification recognised by employers in Ireland?
faq.a: Yes. PMP (from PMI) and CSM (from Scrum Alliance) are global credentials recognised identically everywhere, including by employers and recruiters across Ireland.
